name: Balkanized United States
description: The contiguous United States shattered into nine successor nations along the old sectional fault lines — the New England Commonwealth, the Mid-Atlantic States, the Confederation of Dixie, the Republic of Texas, Deseret, Cascadia, the California Republic, the Great Lakes Federation, and the Heartland. Borders trace the Appalachian spine, the Mississippi and Missouri, the Rockies, the Rio Grande, and the Great Lakes shorelines.
